name: Signal Workshop
positioning: Good work deserves a better signal.
audience: Small business owners, creators, consultants, contractors, and operators who need clearer web, content, and business systems.
voice: Practical, clear, direct, useful, calm, human. Avoid agency bloat, guru language, hype, fake urgency, and generic AI phrasing.
visualStyle: Clean internal-workshop feel, structured panels, useful diagrams, readable type, grounded color accents.
postingFrequency: 3-5 useful posts per week, with daily draft capacity during active campaigns.
ctaOptions: Choose one signal to act on this week.
Ask for a simple systems review.
imageStyleRules: Use diagrams and checklists over decorative stock imagery.
Show signal, decision, and next action.
promptGuardrails: Every post needs one practical signal.
sampleHooks: Good work deserves a better signal.
Most small business systems fail because they are built for someone else's business.
The useful tool is the one you will actually keep using.
